description_long: This is a large, modern chest of drawers with a dark wood grain finish, featuring a rectangular top and slightly tapered sides. The front face is organized into three rows of drawers, with the top row containing four smaller drawers and the lower two rows each containing two larger drawers, for a total of eight. Each drawer is equipped with a minimalist recessed handle, blending seamlessly into the drawer fronts for a sleek, contemporary look. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the same dark wood grain pattern without any additional features or ornamentation. The chest stands on four short, sturdy feet, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. Its overall appearance is functional and understated, suitable for both residential and urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or apartment hallways.
description: A large, dark wood grain chest of drawers with eight recessed-handle drawers and a sleek, modern design. The piece is sturdy, functional, and visually minimalistic.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight drawers with recessed handles and the full width of the chest.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and tapered profile, with the wood grain pattern visible and no drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no drawers or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with the same tapered profile and wood grain finish.
